state.title: git diff -- tensorflow/core/kernels/pooling_ops_3d.cc

part.text:
Applied the direct security backport in `tensorflow/core/kernels/pooling_ops_3d.cc`, adding batch and channel dimension checks before `AvgPool3DGrad` CPU output writes.

    +            "Expected first dimension of tensor_in_shape and "
